title: End of Eva question
wikitext:
[]: End of Eva question             Quote Post by Rahxephon » Tue Jun 04, 2013 11:39 am I thought the dummy plugs were made from Rei so how come the dummy plugs inserted into the Eva series that kill Rei say "Kaworu" on them?

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Tue Jun 04, 2013 11:42 am Different crowd. Nerv's dummies are Rei; Seele's dummies are Kaworu. Remember when he says to her "we're the same"?

[]:             Quote Post by Jurrasic » Tue Jun 04, 2013 11:51 am pwhodges wrote: Different crowd. Nerv's dummies are Rei; Seele's dummies are Kaworu. Remember when he says to her "we're the same"?

[]:             Quote Post by Chuckman » Tue Jun 04, 2013 12:23 pm I wouldn't call it an ace in the hole, even. If you read behind the lines it's clear the end goal of the Eva project was controlling them all remotely via the dummy system. They were doing experiments related to it through the entire series. Rei's ability to universally synchronize (unless Yui willfully rejects her) in effect makes her a proto-dummy system. Going the next step with some kind of cyborg abomination with no free will is completely logical.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Tue Jun 04, 2013 2:08 pm The presence of "Kaworu" on the dummy plugs actually conveys a whole wealth of information to us in a single shot. Firstly, we learn that Seele effectively have an Evangelion program running in parallel to Nerv's. Secondly, we know that Kaworu was being used in this program in a similar way to Rei Thirdly, we know that since Nerv knew nothing of Kaworu prior to his arrival in #24, the existane of this separate programs shows that Seele have been preparing contingencies against Nerv for some time. Finally, given that Kaworu is dead, and that the destruction of the Rei clones destroyed Nerv's Dummy system, we can presume that either the Kaworu dummy plugs work on a different principle, or else there is still a tank of (smiling) Kaworu clones somewhere in Seele's possession controlling the MP Evas. If nothing else, it would fit the grinning yet slugging MP behaviour.

[]:             Quote Post by gchristnsn » Tue Jun 04, 2013 2:40 pm It's worth to add, that the Rei-based dummy plug was able synchronize only with 01 (and possibly with 00, which contains a copy of Rei's personality in the core). This is because the dummy plug contains Rei's personality copied with the personality copy-machine (remember that glass tube with LCL and naked Rei), and Rei's personality is able synchronize only with Yui's personality (in fact her mother) and with a yet another copy of itself. Probably Kaworu-based dummy-system was able synchronize with any Adam-based Eva as Kaworu or also used two copies of Kaworu's personality at the both ends. Gendo's Evas were testbed models with assigned pilots, so there was actually little need in the dummy plug system for them. It's ironical that Seele used these testbed Evas to fight angels, and their gorgeous white Eva-series were necessary only to generate anti AT-field during the third impact (although it's also convenient to destroy Unit 02 using them). Their soulles dummy plugs where needed because the souls of all the Humanity were necessary for the complementation according to the scrolls.

[]:             Quote Post by Rahxephon » Tue Jun 04, 2013 3:29 pm Great posts guys! This clears things up a lot! I love this site :) That there might be a tank of kaworu kuns somewhere does bring some interesting possibilities... Could there be a kaworu 2 and 3 like Rei? :p

[]:             Quote Post by SimplyMason0 » Wed Jun 05, 2013 4:02 am Rahxephon wrote: Great posts guys! This clears things up a lot! I love this site :) That there might be a tank of kaworu kuns somewhere does bring some interesting possibilities... Could there be a kaworu 2 and 3 like Rei? :p

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Wed Jun 05, 2013 4:08 am SimplyMason0 wrote: I think it was implied that Rei is not that old. So its likely that Kaworu isn't either. Not 100% sure. If she was chronologically 14, then it means Gendo made her as insurance before Yui died.

[]: Re: End of Eva question             Quote Post by Lavinius » Wed Jun 05, 2013 8:49 am Rahxephon wrote: I thought the dummy plugs were made from Rei so how come the dummy plugs inserted into the Eva series that kill Rei say "Kaworu" on them?

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Wed Jun 05, 2013 8:55 am gchristnsn wrote: It's worth to add, that the Rei-based dummy plug was able synchronize only with 01 (and possibly with 00, which contains a copy of Rei's personality in the core). This is because the dummy plug contains Rei's personality copied with the personality copy-machine (remember that glass tube with LCL and naked Rei), and Rei's personality is able synchronize only with Yui's personality (in fact her mother) and with a yet another copy of itself. Probably Kaworu-based dummy-system was able synchronize with any Adam-based Eva as Kaworu or also used two copies of Kaworu's personality at the both ends.

[]:             Quote Post by Rahxephon » Wed Jun 05, 2013 11:23 am Shinoyami65 wrote: Well, Eva-02 had the Dummpy Plug data loaded, it was just never used. We don't know if it would have worked and there's no conclusive statement about it in the film. Rei also offers to pilot Eva-02 at one point, implying that she could sync with it as well. Should add that the Kaworu Dummy Plugs in the MP Evas kill Asuka, not Rei. Hence Lavinius-kun's reaction.

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Wed Jun 05, 2013 11:32 am Rahxephon wrote: TYPO i just got done watching the end of eva for the 6th time last night i swear i knew! ;P
